landing.title: What do you want to do?
landing.subtitle: Choose how you want to start configuring your Careers Site.
landing.createTitle: Create a Careers Site from scratch
landing.createDesc: Configure your site from scratch step by step.
landing.editDesc: Load a previous configuration to continue editing.

header.unsavedDesc: Do you want to leave without saving?

importModal.title: Load configuration
importModal.subtitle: Upload the JSON and ZIP you exported before to resume editing with everything pre-filled.
importModal.errorGeneric: We couldn't process the files. Please verify they are valid and try again.
importModal.errorNoJson: We couldn't find the JSON file. Make sure you select the correct file.

generalConfig.title: General settings
generalConfig.desc: Basic site data, header and footer. This configuration applies to all pages.
generalConfig.urlSlugHelper: Added after jobs.humand.co/ to form your site address.
generalConfig.headerDesc: The top bar with your logo that appears on all pages.
generalConfig.logoHelper: A logo in light colors is recommended to ensure good visibility across all site pages.
generalConfig.footerDesc: The bottom bar with legal links that appears on all pages.
generalConfig.footerWebsiteText: Text for the company URL link (optional)
generalConfig.footerWebsiteTextDefaultInfo: By default we use your jobs site name as the footer link text.

homePage.title: Home page
homePage.desc: This is the welcome page of your jobs site. You can configure the main header, an optional info section, and see how featured jobs are displayed.
homePage.heroButton: The "Explore jobs" button is fixed and not configurable.
homePage.infoSectionDesc: Images, titles and descriptions about your company, culture or benefits.
homePage.cardsWarning: Some cards are incomplete. Complete image, title and description in each one, or remove them to continue.
homePage.featuredJobsHelper: Shown automatically when there are 3 or more published jobs. If there are fewer, this section won't appear on the site.

jobList.title: Job list
jobList.desc: This is the main page where candidates search and explore available jobs.
jobList.jobDescPlaceholder: Discover our job opportunities and find the ideal position for you.
jobList.imageInfo: This image is also used as background in the job detail and application form. If not uploaded, a dark grey background is shown.

export.title: Configuration summary
export.desc: Review your configuration and download the files to upload to Humand Ops. Exporting downloads two files: a JSON with the full site configuration and a ZIP with all images and logos used. All required fields must be complete to export.
export.footerWebsiteText: Text for the company URL link
export.homeDisabledDesc: The home page is not enabled. To configure it, turn on the toggle from the Home page section.
export.cardsWarning: Incomplete cards won't be included in the site. Complete image, title and description in each card for them to appear.

preview.homeDisabled: The home page is not active
preview.homeDisabledDesc: Candidates will go directly to the job listing.

fileUpload.dropText: Choose a file or drag it here
fileUpload.defaultTypes: Allowed formats: JPG or PNG up to 50mb
